actions.description: Grants permission to add one or more tags to a certificate
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:AddTagsToCertificate. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to add one or more tags to a certificate. Access level: Tagging. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to delete a certificate and its associated private key
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:DeleteCertificate. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to delete a certificate and its associated private key. Access level: Write. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to retreive a certificates and its metadata
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:DescribeCertificate. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to retreive a certificates and its metadata. Access level: Read. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to export an exportable certificate for use anywhere
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:ExportCertificate. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to export an exportable certificate for use anywhere. Access level: Read. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve account level configuration from AWS Certificate Manager
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:GetAccountConfiguration. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to retrieve account level configuration from AWS Certificate Manager. Access level: Read. Applicable resource types: All resources. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve a certificate and certificate chain for a certificate ARN
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:GetCertificate. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to retrieve a certificate and certificate chain for a certificate ARN. Access level: Read. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to import a 3rd party certificate into AWS Certificate Manager (ACM)
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:ImportCertificate. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to import a 3rd party certificate into AWS Certificate Manager (ACM). Access level: Write. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of certificates for specific certificate parameters
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:ListCertificates. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of certificates for specific certificate parameters. Access level: List. Applicable resource types: All resources. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to lists the tags that have been associated with a certificate
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:ListTagsForCertificate. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to lists the tags that have been associated with a certificate. Access level: Read. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to update account level configuration in AWS Certificate Manager
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:PutAccountConfiguration. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to update account level configuration in AWS Certificate Manager. Access level: Write. Applicable resource types: All resources. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to remove one or more tags from a certificate
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:RemoveTagsFromCertificate. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to remove one or more tags from a certificate. Access level: Tagging. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to renew an eligible private certificate
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:RenewCertificate. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to renew an eligible private certificate. Access level: Write. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to requests a public or private certificate
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:RequestCertificate. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to requests a public or private certificate. Access level: Write. Applicable resource types: All resources. Supported condition keys: aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}, aws:TagKeys, acm:DomainNames, acm:CertificateTransparencyLogging, acm:ValidationMethod, acm:KeyAlgorithm, acm:CertificateAuthority, acm:Export.

actions.description: Grants permission to resend an email to request domain ownership validation
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:ResendValidationEmail. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to resend an email to request domain ownership validation. Access level: Write. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to revoke an exportable certificate
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:RevokeCertificate. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to revoke an exportable certificate. Access level: Write. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of certificates matching search criteria
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:SearchCertificates. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of certificates matching search criteria. Access level: List. Applicable resource types: All resources. Supported condition keys: None.

actions.description: Grants permission to update a certificate configuration. Use this to specify whether to opt in to or out of certificate transparency logging
actions.full_text: IAM Action: acm:UpdateCertificateOptions. Service: AWS Certificate Manager. Description: Grants permission to update a certificate configuration. Use this to specify whether to opt in to or out of certificate transparency logging. Access level: Write. Applicable resource types: certificate*. Supported condition keys: None.
